source_metadata.title: 2024/12/03 - FD
source_metadata.description:
Tuesday, 3 December 2024 | Foreign Affairs, Defence and Trade Committee 

Item of business: 

2023/24 Annual review of the Ministry of Defence; 2023/24 Annual review of the New Zealand Defence Force

Hearing of evidence (2.30pm to 3.00pm): 

Hon Judith Collins KC, Minister of Defence
Brook Barrington, Chief Executive, Ministry of Defence
Air Marshal Tony Davies, Chief of Defence Force

Hon Chris Penk, Minister for Veterans
Alex Brunt, Acting General Manager Veterans Affairs

Hearing of evidence (3.00pm to 6.00pm): 

Ministry of Defence

Brook Barrington, Chief Executive
Sarah Minson, Deputy Secretary - Capability Delivery
Pasanka Wickremasinghe, Chief Financial Officer

New Zealand Defence Force

Air Marshal Tony Davies, Chief of Defence Force
Rear Admiral Mat Williams, Vice Chief of Defence Force
Brigadier James Kennedy-Good, Director Defence Legal Service
Jacinda Funnell, Chief People Officer
Bridget Marks, Chief Finance Officer
Alex Brunt, Acting General Manager Veterans Affairs
Mark Brunton, Head Defence Estate and Infrastructure
